en-IN.subtext_in_person: In-person appointment at the clinic. Standard consultation.
en-IN.subtext_teleconsult: Video, audio, or chat consultation from anywhere.
en-IN.subtext_followup: Follow-up visit with your previous doctor.
en-IN.subtext_second_opinion: Second opinion from a specialist — usually via video.
en-IN.subtext_home_visit: Doctor visits your home. Available in select areas.
en-IN.subtext_emergency: Same-day emergency slot. Please call if no confirmation in 10 minutes.
en-IN.reason_placeholder: Briefly describe your concern — helps the doctor prepare
en-IN.consent_summary: To book this appointment, we need to share your details with the clinic. Please review each purpose and choose what you're comfortable with.
en-IN.consent_purpose_1_title: Share my details with the clinic
en-IN.consent_purpose_1_desc: Your name, phone, preferred date/time and reason will be shared with the clinic so they can confirm your appointment.
en-IN.consent_purpose_2_desc: SMS and WhatsApp reminders 24h and 1h before your appointment. You can turn these off anytime.
en-IN.consent_purpose_3_desc: Occasional health tips from the clinic and news about their services. Marketing — fully optional.
en-IN.trust_line: DPDPA 2023 compliant · Data stored in India · End-to-end encrypted

ar-AE.subtext_in_person: موعد حضوري في العيادة. استشارة عادية.
ar-AE.subtext_teleconsult: استشارة بالفيديو أو الصوت أو الدردشة من أي مكان.
ar-AE.subtext_second_opinion: رأي ثان من اختصاصي — عادةً عبر الفيديو.
ar-AE.subtext_home_visit: يزور الطبيب منزلك. متوفرة في مناطق محددة.
ar-AE.subtext_emergency: موعد طوارئ في نفس اليوم. يُرجى الاتصال إذا لم يصل التأكيد خلال 10 دقائق.
ar-AE.reason_placeholder: اشرح حالتك بإيجاز — يساعد الطبيب على التحضير
ar-AE.consent_summary: لحجز هذا الموعد، نحتاج إلى مشاركة بياناتك مع العيادة. يُرجى مراجعة كل غرض واختيار ما توافق عليه.
ar-AE.consent_purpose_1_desc: سيتم مشاركة الاسم والهاتف والموعد والسبب مع العيادة لتأكيد حجزك.
ar-AE.consent_purpose_2_desc: رسائل نصية وواتساب قبل 24 و1 ساعة من الموعد. يمكن إيقافها في أي وقت.
ar-AE.submit_disabled_msg: يجب الموافقة على الغرض المطلوب للمتابعة
ar-AE.trust_line: متوافق مع قانون PDPL · بيانات محفوظة محليًا · مشفّر بالكامل

en-AE.TODO_TRANSLATION: Full en-AE bundle — mirrors en-IN with clinic terminology swapped. Extend when AE clinic goes live with English-speaking patients.
en-AE.trust_line: PDPL 2021 compliant · Data in UAE · End-to-end encrypted

en-GB.subtext_in_person: In-person appointment at the surgery. Standard consultation.
en-GB.subtext_teleconsult: Video or audio consultation from anywhere.
en-GB.subtext_followup: Follow-up appointment with your previous GP.
en-GB.subtext_second_opinion: Second opinion from a specialist — usually by video.
en-GB.subtext_home_visit: Doctor visits your home. Available in select areas.
en-GB.subtext_emergency: Same-day urgent slot. If this is a medical emergency, call 999 or attend A&E.
en-GB.reason_placeholder: Briefly describe your concern — aids the GP's triage
en-GB.consent_summary: Under UK GDPR, we need your consent for each purpose below. Choose what you agree to.
en-GB.consent_purpose_1_title: Share my details with the practice
en-GB.consent_purpose_1_desc: Name, phone, date/time and reason shared with the practice to confirm your booking.
en-GB.consent_purpose_2_desc: A reminder the day before your appointment. Unsubscribe anytime.
en-GB.consent_purpose_3_desc: Newsletters and health campaigns. Fully optional.
en-GB.trust_line: UK GDPR compliant · ICO-registered · End-to-end encrypted

en-US.subtext_teleconsult: Video or phone visit from anywhere.
en-US.subtext_second_opinion: Second opinion from a specialist — usually by video.
en-US.subtext_home_visit: Provider visits your home. Select areas only.
en-US.subtext_emergency: Same-day urgent slot. If this is a medical emergency, call 911.
en-US.reason_placeholder: Brief description helps your provider prepare
en-US.npp_summary: Under HIPAA, the practice is required to protect the privacy of your health information. Their Notice of Privacy Practices describes how your information may be used and disclosed for treatment, payment, and healthcare operations — and your rights.
en-US.npp_acknowledgment_label: I acknowledge that I have received and reviewed the practice's Notice of Privacy Practices.
en-US.npp_footer: You may receive a paper copy of the NPP at the front desk. For complaints, contact the practice's Privacy Officer or the HHS Office for Civil Rights. Marketing communications require a separate written authorization (HIPAA §164.508).
en-US.trust_line: HIPAA compliant · PHI encrypted · TLS 1.3 in transit
